session.assistant:
make: failed with exit code 2
## Summary
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2 due to a **Prettier formatting issue**.
### Failure Details
**Prettier Check failed:** - Code style issues found in **3 files** - The files that need formatting: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### Passing Components
All other checks passed successfully:
| Check | Result | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | AGENTS.md standard | PASSED | - | | CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing | PASSED | 19 files checked, 0 violations | | Linting (ruff) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Format Check (ruff format) | PASSED | 1614 files already formatted | | Markdown Check | PASSED | - | | Exec Reference Check | PASSED | Reference is up to date | | Type Check (ty) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit Tests (erk) | PASSED | 5647 passed in 21.88s | | Tests (erk-dev) | PASSED | 136 passed in 4.05s | | Tests (erk-statusline) | PASSED | 115 passed in 0.77s | | Tests (erk-mcp) | PASSED | 24 tests (output truncated) |
### Root Cause
Three markdown documentation files have code style issues that Prettier detected. These files would need to be reformatted with `prettier --write` to pass the fast-ci check.
